ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airline */,
  "short_code" TEXT /* Short code of the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the airline */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the airline */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airline */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airline */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the airline's official website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of aircraft in the airline's fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_times" (
  "time_slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time slot */,
  "time_slot_name" TEXT /* Name of the time slot (e.g., Early Morning, Morning) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the time slot */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the time slot */,
  "time_slot_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the time slot */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone in which the time slot is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_slot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule entry */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline */,
  "time_slot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time slot */,
  "flight_count" INTEGER /* Number of flights in the time slot */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week for the schedule */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the schedule */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the schedule is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_time_slot_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_slot_id") REFERENCES flight_times ("time_slot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_airport" TEXT /* Departure airport code */,
  "arrival_airport" TEXT /* Arrival airport code */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., On Time, Delayed, Cancelled) */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual time the flight departed */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual time the flight arrived */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number at the departure and arrival airports */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal number at the departure and arrival airports */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for the flight */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the flight in kilometers */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the aircraft */,
  "occupancy" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "baggage_allowance" INTEGER /* Maximum baggage allowance for the flight */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Cabin class of the flight (e.g., Economy, Business, First) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_airport FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_arrival_airport FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Airport code */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport's location */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the airport */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the airport's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the airport */,
  "runways" INTEGER /* Number of runways at the airport */,
  "terminals" INTEGER /* Number of terminals at the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., airline operator, travel agent, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_logout" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last logout */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user's session */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time of the status update */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the flight (e.g., Delayed, Cancelled) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status update */,
  "actual_update_time" TEXT /* Actual time the status update was made */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the status update */,
  "flight_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the flight when the update was made (e.g., Ground, Airborne) */,
  "delay_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay if the flight is delayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_updates_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the feedback is for */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer providing feedback */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_time" TEXT /* Time the feedback was submitted */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement from the customer */,
  "flight_class" TEXT /* Class of the flight the customer was traveling in (e.g., Economy, Business, First) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel preference entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "preferred_airline" TEXT /* Preferred airline */,
  "preferred_time_slot" TEXT /* Preferred time slot (e.g., Morning, Evening) */,
  "preferred_departure_airport" TEXT /* Preferred departure airport */,
  "preferred_arrival_airport" TEXT /* Preferred arrival airport */,
  "preferred_cabin_class" TEXT /* Preferred cabin class (e.g., Economy, Business, First) */,
  "preferred_seat_type" TEXT /* Preferred seat type (e.g., Window, Aisle) */,
  "preferred_meal_type" TEXT /* Preferred meal type (e.g., Vegetarian, Vegan) */,
  "preferred_luggage" TEXT /* Preferred luggage type (e.g., Checked, Carry-on) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_preferences_preferred_time_slot FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_time_slot") REFERENCES flight_times ("time_slot_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_profiles ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_preferences_preferred_arrival_airport FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_arrival_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_preferences_preferred_airline FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_airline") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_preferences_preferred_departure_airport FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_departure_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_profiles" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "frequent_flyer_number" TEXT /* Frequent flyer number of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the customer */,
  "travel_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of travel (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
